Welcome back. And so one of the first things I want to cover is the messaging script. So this is the entire script. The download is available below this probably somewhere. And so this is just kind of the overarching like what we're doing and this is the rules of the game. All right, so the objective here, we need to be clear, is that we're trying to get a warm up call. All right, that's the entire point of messaging these people is to get them on a set call. Where you're gonna warm them up, you're gonna build rapport, and then you'd ultimately set the close call. All right, so there's really three steps to this. First is your messaging people, then you're getting them on the phone, and then you're going to set a close appointment and then sell them there, okay? So the objective is to go from step one, messaging them outbound to step two, which is getting them on a 10 minute warm up call. All right, that's the entire point of the messaging process. Now, golden rules for every single message, this is the golden rule. And this is also the golden rule for talking to human beings. And you'd be amazed at how many people don't follow this. All right, you acknowledge and encourage what the person just said, okay? So you're going to compliment them, you're going to make them feel good about what they just said, that gives them a dopamine hit, and then they want to keep talking to you because you make them feel good, all right? That's what drives behavior. If you make them feel good, they'll want to keep talking to you. But you need to lead them down the process so that they actually eventually become a prospect who buys, right? And so you make them feel good, and then you ask the next question. Make them feel good, ask the next question. All right, so it's acknowledgement, encouragement, building rapport with the first statement. So every response should have a statement and then a question, statement, question, all right? I'm saying this over and over again, crystal clear, so that you don't mess this up because if you don't do this, you will be significantly as less effective really as a human being, but also as trying to make money. All right, so example here, acknowledgement, oh cool, my answer to comment, you must be really detail-oriented. Question, just sitting a lot, you know, during your day, making it hard to work out. Does it, was working in office, make it hard to eat healthy? Does being around kids all day make it hard to eat healthy? Like you, you can take whatever they're saying and then transition it into fitness so you can start leading them down the path that we're trying to get to, which is getting them on a call so we can talk to them and then ultimately sell them and help them, all right? Now, strategy-wise, this is the overarching layout for how this works, we're gonna open, then we're gonna relate to them, so we're gonna build rapport, all right, we're gonna just try to sound like we're human beings and not like just like, hey, you wanna come home with me? Like, yeah, like treat this like a date, you know what I mean? Like, have some small talk, get your beverages, then get your appetizers, then get your main course, then get to the dessert, right? Like you gotta work through it, you don't just like skip straight to dessert or skip straight to going home, it doesn't work that way, right? This is the process, it's very straightforward, it doesn't take a long time to work through this and this should feel natural to you because this is how a normal conversation should go. The number one way for you to mess this up is to just be like, hey, how's it going? You struggling with fitness? Cool, let's hop on a phone call, like no one responds to that, all right, it's weird, don't do it, all right. So that is the objective that is a strategy for this and so let's dive into the actual script. So the scripting, this is opener and this is key, so you're gonna be like, hey, Becky, what's going on in your world today? Now, follow up question, right? You wanna relate it, because especially if you're doing this to colder people, you wanna relate all points back to not having time to eat healthy or workouts, you're trying to already put a flavor to this, right? And so we want to relate to them and say it depends on whether this is warm or cold. So if it's warm, then you say, hey, I just saw that you commented or liked on my post, thank you, we haven't had a chance to connect. If it's warm, it's pretty easy because you have a big reason for messaging them, right? Saw you liked, saw you commented, hey, I noticed you've been following me for a while and we haven't yet connected, it looks like you're into skydiving, I did that once and it was crazy, are you super active? And so you're having a conversation with this person. If it's warm, it's much easier, like if they're a follower of yours or they've liked something or commented, which is why you should always exhaust those things first. Now, after you've exhausted all of the warm stuff, so you open with, hey, what's going on in your world and then the reason why I'm messaging you, right, is, hey, I saw you could, I noticed you did XYZ, you started following, hey, I saw you just started following me on Instagram, cool, you got 10 followers a day, then message each one of them, right? Like this is how this works. Cold is people who aren't following you, aren't, haven't interacted with anything and you found them through search tools with hashtags or intelligence search on Facebook, all right? The point here is to seem, is to relate and you have to be more relatable with cold than you do with warm because warm, they already took a micro step towards you, right? With cold, you have to be like, hey, see that you have kids, I actually grew up in a big family or hey, see that you have kids, they keep you busy or like, oh, that's awesome, like, see that you have a dog, I have a dog too. Like you wanna try and relate what we're talking to and so I give you a couple examples here, but you need to be a human being and ultimately, like, that is the skill that you're going to refine as you do this. The good news is that you have unlimited amount of mess ups before you, like, you're not paying for these, so you're gonna reach out and you're gonna get better and you're gonna get better and it doesn't cost you anything but the time it takes you to learn and so if you wanna get, like, really good at something, this is free education on how to sell, all right, and you have unlimited bats because it's free, all right? So, warm, they already took the micro-remit, just relate the micro-remit they just took, so you're saying this is why I'm messaging you, cold, relate to them and then try and tie a bond between something they do and something you do or something they've experienced and something you've experienced, all right? That is what makes you a real person. Then, you're gonna transition, which is, hey, what do you do for work? All right, this is the easy leading question to A, make sure that they have work and that they have dollars and then B, you're gonna transition to that to say, hey, does it keep you busy, right? Because the follow-up there is gonna be like, oh, wow, does it make it hard to eat healthy? Oh, wow, does it make it hard to work out? And so, we're either gonna tie it to fitness or nutrition. You wanna go from first message to phone call to close call as fast as you can possibly, because it decreases exponentially with their interest, with time, okay? That way they do it right then, all right? And it's important to leave that open loop. This is a really, like this is an important strategy. Make sure you keep the open loop if you aren't going to call them immediately, which you should, set an open loop and try and get them to schedule today, all right? At the very latest tomorrow, it has to be today or tomorrow because no matter what, if they're going to work out, then they're gonna have to work out at least once every 48 hours, probably. And so whatever the amount of time they take them to work out is when they should be able to make time for the phone call. All right, and you need to like believe that so that if someone's like, oh, I've got time next week, like you're screwed, it's not gonna work, like you have, it's an obstacle and you have to overcome it now, all right? Now, the last piece there is follow up. Hey, any issues? Saw you didn't grab a time, everything good, right? Now, if you do the open loop well and you built some report, they should be already doing this automatically if you didn't immediately already get on the phone with them, all right? Now, with the follow up, keep moving people along the process. You wanna be as fast as possible in your responses and try and get this process completely done in 48 hours or less. What I mean by that is that you want to have messaged them and gotten them on a call within 48 hours no matter what, all right, that's the goal here, all right? And then you wanna schedule that 60 minute call for really like same day next day, all right? And that way, your speed to money will be fast, all right? You have your open, which is going to get you from cold person to transitioning to talking about fitness to then clarifying their goals and understanding where they're coming from to closing the call.
